symptoms.symptom_name: Severe migratory polyarthralgia with diffuse myalgia

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Migratory polyarthralgia with myalgia on a documented Ross River background fits an arboviral sequelae flare.
Migratory polyarticular pain is atypical for monoarticular joint sepsis.

symptoms.symptom_name: No single fiery/hot/hugely swollen joint; no high fever/rigors

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of a single hot, red, hugely swollen joint and no high fever argues strongly against joint sepsis, though examination is needed.

symptoms.symptom_name: Recurrent stereotyped post-Ross River flare pattern

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A consistent prior pattern supports a flare over a new joint infection.

symptoms.symptom_name: Inability to weight-bear with high fall risk (isolated, cluttered home)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Non-weight-bearing pain in a cluttered home while alone creates a genuine fall/injury risk.

symptoms.symptom_name: Bilateral knee/ankle tenderness without effusion/erythema/extreme heat (examination)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Tender joints without effusion/erythema fit a non-septic inflammatory flare.
No effusion/erythema/extreme heat argues against a septic joint on exam.

symptoms.symptom_name: Documented Ross River virus infection 18 months ago

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Documented Ross River infection is the substrate for recurrent arthralgia.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: A severe migratory polyarthralgia flare with no single septic-looking joint and no high fever, on a documented Ross River background, is most likely an arboviral sequelae flare — but joints can't be examined remotely, so septic arthritis is safety-netted with a low threshold, and the inability to weight-bear while isolated needs fall-safety support.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: To assess for a septic/effused joint; cannot be done via chat.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Joint aspiration if any single joint is disproportionately hot/red/swollen
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Definitive test to exclude septic arthritis if the exam raises concern.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Bloods (FBC, CRP, ESR, Ross River serology) ± X-ray
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: To characterise inflammation and confirm the arboviral picture.
